caption: A man with blond hair, glasses, and a dark patterned shirt wears silver headphones and speaks into a black microphone in a room featuring a light-colored wooden wall and a Christmas tree decorated with colorful lights. In the initial scene, he is overlaid on a video game broadcast of an American football game, which shows a field with players in black and white uniforms. On-screen text includes "2nd & 4", "1:09", "33", "MOMENTUM LEGEND", and "X FACTOR". A framed blue jersey with the number "20" hangs on the wall behind him. As the sequence progresses, the football game disappears, and the view shifts to a close-up of the man. He continues speaking, his facial expressions shifting slightly while he remains positioned in front of the microphone and the framed jersey.
